interactions.stageContent: {"sections":[{"title":"Challenge","content":"Meridian Dynamics currently spends 5-7 business days assembling first-contact pagers for new prospects. This delay means opportunities go cold before the first meaningful touchpoint reaches the buyer."},{"title":"Proposed Solution","content":"AtlusDeck generates a polished, brand-compliant one-pager in under 2 hours using AI-driven content assembly. The pager is personalized to the prospect's industry, pain points, and engagement context."},{"title":"Value Proposition","content":"Reduce first-contact turnaround by 95%, increase prospect engagement rates by 20%, and ensure every pager reflects the latest company messaging and brand guidelines."}]}
